productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Navy Blue Polo Tshirts
description: Composition Navy blue short Sleeve sleeves polo neck t-shirt made of 100% polyester, has a ribbed collar with a fabric tape detailing on the inseam, mesh panels on the sides, Short Sleeve buttoned placket, brand name and logo Printed on the right chest, patented adidas 3-Stripes Printed on both sleeves and engineered with ClimaCool technology Fitting
